# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

# Set up a non-root user for security
RUN useradd -m processoruser

# Set the working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy files from the mounted volume to the container
COPY --chown=processoruser:processoruser /uploads /app/uploads

# Switch to the non-root user
USER processoruser

# Command to process files (replace with actual processing command)
CMD ["echo", "Processing files in /app/uploads"]
